_meta.instructions: Fill in the "translation" field for each key below. Translate from English to Croatian. Do not change the key names. Return the completed file to add translations back into the app.

home.tagline.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
home.tagline.translation: Izvrsnost u premium potrošačkoj robi od 2019.

home.brandStatement.en: A leading global consumer goods company delivering premium food products across diverse categories with international quality standards.
home.brandStatement.translation: Vodeća globalna tvrtka za robu široke potrošnje koja isporučuje vrhunske prehrambene proizvode u različitim kategorijama s međunarodnim standardima kvalitete.

home.taglineStart.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since
home.taglineStart.translation: Izvrsnost u premium potrošačkim dobrima od

products.discoverPremium.en: Discover our premium range of products crafted with care and excellence.
products.discoverPremium.translation: Otkrijte našu vrhunsku ponudu proizvoda izrađenih s pažnjom i izvrsnošću.

products.noSubcategories.en: No subcategories available for this category.
products.noSubcategories.translation: Za ovu kategoriju nema dostupnih podkategorija.

products.snacksDesc.en: Tasty snacks for any time of day.
products.snacksDesc.translation: Ukusni zalogaji za bilo koje doba dana.

about.subtitle.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
about.subtitle.translation: Izvrsnost u premium potrošačkoj robi od 2019.

about.story1.en: Founded in 2019, Harvics has grown from a visionary idea into a global leader in premium consumer goods. Our journey is defined by a relentless pursuit of quality and a commitment to innovation.
about.story1.translation: Osnovan 2019. godine, Harvics je od vizionarske ideje izrastao u globalnog lidera u premium potrošačkoj robi. Naše putovanje definirano je neumornom težnjom za kvalitetom i predanošću inovacijama.

about.story2.en: We operate across 40+ countries, delivering products that enrich lives and set new standards in the industry. From our humble beginnings to our global presence, our values remain unchanged.
about.story2.translation: Poslujemo u više od 40 zemalja, isporučujući proizvode koji obogaćuju živote i postavljaju nove standarde u industriji. Od naših skromnih početaka do naše globalne prisutnosti, naše vrijednosti ostaju nepromijenjene.

csr.hero.description.en: At Harvics, we are committed to making a positive impact on the world. Our CSR initiatives focus on sustainability, community empowerment, and ethical business practices.
csr.hero.description.translation: U Harvicsu smo posvećeni pozitivnom utjecaju na svijet. Naše inicijative društvene odgovornosti usmjerene su na održivost, osnaživanje zajednice i etične poslovne prakse.

csr.initiatives.description.en: We focus on four main pillars to drive sustainable change and create shared value for all stakeholders.
csr.initiatives.description.translation: Usredotočujemo se na četiri glavna stupa kako bismo potaknuli održive promjene i stvorili zajedničku vrijednost za sve dionike.

csr.sustainability.description.en: Reducing our environmental footprint through renewable energy and waste reduction.
csr.sustainability.description.translation: Smanjenje našeg ekološkog otiska kroz obnovljive izvore energije i smanjenje otpada.

csr.community.description.en: Empowering local communities through education, healthcare, and economic development.
csr.community.description.translation: Osnaživanje lokalnih zajednica kroz obrazovanje, zdravstvo i gospodarski razvoj.

csr.education.description.en: Providing access to quality education and scholarships for underprivileged students.
csr.education.description.translation: Omogućavanje pristupa kvalitetnom obrazovanju i stipendijama za učenike iz siromašnih obitelji.

csr.health.description.en: Improving access to healthcare and nutrition in underserved regions.
csr.health.description.translation: Poboljšanje pristupa zdravstvenoj zaštiti i prehrani u nedovoljno opskrbljenim regijama.

csr.achievements.2022.description.en: Honored for our innovative approach to social responsibility.
csr.achievements.2022.description.translation: Počašćeni zbog našeg inovativnog pristupa društvenoj odgovornosti.

csr.achievements.2023.description.en: Awarded for our extensive community outreach programs.
csr.achievements.2023.description.translation: Nagrađeno za naše opsežne programe rada s lokalnom zajednicom.

csr.achievements.2024.description.en: Recognized for our commitment to carbon neutrality.
csr.achievements.2024.description.translation: Prepoznati smo po našoj predanosti ugljičnoj neutralnosti.

csr.achievements.description.en: Recognizing our milestones in creating a better world.
csr.achievements.description.translation: Prepoznavanje naših prekretnica u stvaranju boljeg svijeta.

csr.cta.title.en: Join Us in Making a Difference
csr.cta.title.translation: Pridružite nam se u stvaranju promjene

csr.cta.description.en: Partner with us or learn more about how we are building a sustainable future.
csr.cta.description.translation: Postanite naš partner ili saznajte više o tome kako gradimo održivu budućnost.

contact.subtitle.en: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us through any of these channels.
contact.subtitle.translation: Voljeli bismo čuti vaše mišljenje. Kontaktirajte nas putem bilo kojeg od ovih kanala.

media.description.en: Press resources, brand assets, and the latest news from Harvics Global Ventures.
media.description.translation: Resursi za medije, materijali o robnoj marki i najnovije vijesti iz tvrtke Harvics Global Ventures.

media.sections.news.desc.en: Latest announcements, market expansions, product launches, and corporate updates from Harvics Global Ventures.
media.sections.news.desc.translation: Najnovije najave, širenje tržišta, lansiranje proizvoda i korporativne novosti tvrtke Harvics Global Ventures.

media.sections.gallery.desc.en: High-resolution brand assets, product photography, facility images, and event coverage for media use.
media.sections.gallery.desc.translation: Materijali robne marke visoke rezolucije, fotografije proizvoda, slike objekata i izvještavanje o događajima za medijsku upotrebu.

media.sections.contacts.desc.en: Reach our communications team for press inquiries, interview requests, and partnership announcements.
media.sections.contacts.desc.translation: Za upite za medije, zahtjeve za intervjue i najave partnerstva obratite se našem komunikacijskom timu.

media.headlines.expansion.en: Harvics Expands FMCG Operations to 5 New Southeast Asian Markets
media.headlines.expansion.translation: Harvics proširuje poslovanje s robom široke potrošnje na 5 novih tržišta jugoistočne Azije

media.headlines.aiPlatform.en: New AI-Powered Supply Chain Platform Launched for Global Distribution
media.headlines.aiPlatform.translation: Pokrenuta nova platforma za opskrbni lanac s umjetnom inteligencijom za globalnu distribuciju

media.headlines.carbonNeutral.en: Harvics Achieves Carbon-Neutral Milestone Across All Facilities
media.headlines.carbonNeutral.translation: Harvics postiže prekretnicu ugljične neutralnosti u svim pogonima

media.headlines.partnership.en: Strategic Partnership with Leading Textile Manufacturers in South Asia
media.headlines.partnership.translation: Strateško partnerstvo s vodećim proizvođačima tekstila u Južnoj Aziji

harvicsHouse.subtitle.en: A Legacy of Excellence and Tradition

harvicsHouse.description.en: Harvics House represents the pinnacle of our commitment to quality and heritage. Here, we bring together the finest selection of our premium products, showcased in an environment that reflects our values of elegance, tradition, and innovation.
harvicsHouse.description.translation: Harvics House predstavlja vrhunac naše predanosti kvaliteti i baštini. Ovdje okupljamo najfiniji izbor naših vrhunskih proizvoda, izloženih u okruženju koje odražava naše vrijednosti elegancije, tradicije i inovacije.

harvicsHouse.description2.en: Explore our exclusive collections and discover the story behind every product that bears the Harvics name.
harvicsHouse.description2.translation: Istražite naše ekskluzivne kolekcije i otkrijte priču koja stoji iza svakog proizvoda koji nosi ime Harvics.

footer.tagline.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
footer.tagline.translation: Izvrsnost u premium potrošačkoj robi od 2019.

footer.brandStatement.en: A leading global consumer goods company delivering premium food products across diverse categories with international quality standards.
footer.brandStatement.translation: Vodeća globalna tvrtka za robu široke potrošnje koja isporučuje vrhunske prehrambene proizvode u različitim kategorijama s međunarodnim standardima kvalitete.

footer.subscribeToAlerts.en: Subscribe to receive alerts and updates
footer.subscribeToAlerts.translation: Pretplatite se za primanje obavijesti i novosti

footer.speakUp.en: Speak up if you have concerns about compliance or ethics
footer.speakUp.translation: Progovorite ako imate nedoumica u vezi s usklađenošću ili etikom

footer.contactDescription.en: Get in touch with our team

chatbot.welcome.en: Hello! How can I help you today?
chatbot.welcome.translation: Pozdrav! Kako vam mogu pomoći danas?

chatbot.fallback.default.en: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please rephrase?
chatbot.fallback.default.translation: Žao mi je, nisam to razumio/la. Možete li, molim vas, preformulirati?

chatbot.fallback.help.en: I can help you with product information, orders, or general inquiries. What would you like to know?
chatbot.fallback.help.translation: Mogu vam pomoći s informacijama o proizvodima, narudžbama ili općim upitima. Što biste željeli znati?

chatbot.fallback.contact.en: For more assistance, please contact us at support@harvics.com or call +1-800-HARVICS.
chatbot.fallback.contact.translation: Za dodatnu pomoć, kontaktirajte nas na support@harvics.com ili nazovite +1-800-HARVICS.

globalWorld.form.emailInvalid.en: Please enter a valid email address

globalWorld.form.marketingConsent.en: I agree to receive marketing communications and updates
globalWorld.form.marketingConsent.translation: Slažem se s primanjem marketinških komunikacija i novosti

distributorPortal.dashboard.aiAutomation.en: Auto-approval, stock replenishment, and invoice reminders enabled
distributorPortal.dashboard.aiAutomation.translation: Omogućeno automatsko odobrenje, nadopunjavanje zaliha i podsjetnici za račune

distributorPortal.dashboard.aiRecommenda.en: Based on credit utilization and payment history
distributorPortal.dashboard.aiRecommenda.translation: Na temelju korištenja kredita i povijesti plaćanja
SKU-ovi koje preporučuje umjetna inteligencija za narudžbu

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.comp.translation: Problemi s trgovcima koji čekaju rješavanje

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.translation: Dajte prioritet isporukama koje čekaju prije podneva.
Zatvorite sve neriješene pritužbe u roku od 48 sati.

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.en: Trigger replenishment for low-stock SKUs (auto-create PO).
distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.translation: Pokreni nadopunu za artikle s niskim zalihama (automatsko kreiranje narudžbenice).

distributorPortal.newOrder.noItems.en: No items added yet. Click "Add Item" to start.
distributorPortal.newOrder.noItems.translation: Još nije dodana nijedna stavka. Kliknite "Dodaj stavku" za početak.

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.it.en: At least one order item is required
distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.it.translation: Potrebna je barem jedna stavka narudžbe

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.da.en: Delivery date cannot be in the past
distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.da.translation: Datum isporuke ne može biti u prošlosti

legal.accessDeniedMessage.en: You don't have permission to access the Legal OS module.
legal.accessDeniedMessage.translation: Nemate dopuštenje za pristup modulu Legal OS.

legal.dashboardPage.description.en: Overview of legal operations and compliance status
legal.dashboardPage.description.translation: Pregled pravnih operacija i statusa usklađenosti

legal.trademarks.description.translation: Upravljanje registracijama i prijavama zaštitnih znakova

legal.trademarks.errors.saveFailed.en: Failed to save trademark. Please try again.
legal.trademarks.errors.saveFailed.translation: Spremanje zaštitnog znaka nije uspjelo. Pokušajte ponovno.

legal.legalCases.description.en: Manage legal cases and track their status
legal.legalCases.description.translation: Upravljajte pravnim slučajevima i pratite njihov status

gps.fleetMap.description.en: Real-time tracking of sales officers and delivery vehicles
gps.fleetMap.description.translation: Praćenje prodajnih službenika i dostavnih vozila u stvarnom vremenu

competitor.products.errors.createFailed.en: Failed to create product. Please try again.
competitor.products.errors.createFailed.translation: Nije uspjelo stvaranje proizvoda. Pokušajte ponovno.

competitor.dashboard.description.en: Analytics and insights on competitor products
competitor.dashboard.description.translation: Analitika i uvidi u konkurentske proizvode

crm.domain.customer360.description.en: Complete customer profiles, interaction history, and relationship management
crm.domain.customer360.description.translation: Potpuni profili kupaca, povijest interakcije i upravljanje odnosima

crm.domain.campaigns.description.en: Multi-channel marketing campaigns (IG, FB, TikTok, WhatsApp)
crm.domain.campaigns.description.translation: Višekanalne marketinške kampanje (IG, FB, TikTok, WhatsApp)

crm.domain.leads.description.en: Lead management, qualification, and opportunity pipeline
crm.domain.leads.description.translation: Upravljanje potencijalnim klijentima, kvalifikacija i proces stvaranja prilika

crm.domain.support.description.en: Ticket management, customer service, and issue resolution
crm.domain.support.description.translation: Upravljanje zahtjevima, korisnička podrška i rješavanje problema

crm.domain.loyalty.description.en: Retailer loyalty, gamification, and rewards management
crm.domain.loyalty.description.translation: Upravljanje vjernošću, gamifikacijom i nagradama trgovaca

crm.customerList.customerManagementDescr.en: View and manage your customer relationships, interactions, and campaigns.
crm.customerList.customerManagementDescr.translation: Pregledajte i upravljajte odnosima s kupcima, interakcijama i kampanjama.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action1.en: Confirm upcoming shipments and update GRN schedule.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action1.translation: Potvrdite nadolazeće pošiljke i ažurirajte raspored GRN-a.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action2.en: Review outstanding invoices and share payment advice.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action2.translation: Pregledajte nepodmirene račune i podijelite savjete o plaćanju.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action3.en: Resolve open quality complaints with QA evidence.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action3.translation: Riješite otvorene pritužbe na kvalitetu s dokazima o osiguranju kvalitete.

form.emailInvalid.en: Please enter a valid email address

faq.products.a1.en: We offer a wide range of premium food products including confectionery, beverages, snacks, pasta, bakery items, and frozen foods across multiple categories.
faq.products.a1.translation: Nudimo širok asortiman vrhunskih prehrambenih proizvoda, uključujući slastice, pića, grickalice, tjesteninu, pekarske proizvode i smrznutu hranu u više kategorija.

faq.products.q2.en: Where can I buy Harvics products?

faq.products.a2.en: Our products are available in retail stores across 40+ countries. Use our store locator or contact page to find a retailer near you.
faq.products.a2.translation: Naši proizvodi dostupni su u maloprodajnim trgovinama u više od 40 zemalja. Koristite naš lokator trgovina ili stranicu za kontakt kako biste pronašli trgovca u vašoj blizini.

faq.products.a3.en: Yes, we offer bulk order discounts for businesses and retailers. Visit our Bulk Order Discounts page for more information.
faq.products.a3.translation: Da, nudimo popuste za velike narudžbe za tvrtke i trgovce. Posjetite našu stranicu Popusti za velike narudžbe za više informacija.

faq.ordersShipping.a1.en: We offer various shipping options including standard, express, and international shipping. Free shipping is available on orders over $50.
faq.ordersShipping.a1.translation: Nudimo razne mogućnosti dostave, uključujući standardnu, ekspresnu i međunarodnu dostavu. Besplatna dostava dostupna je za narudžbe preko 50 USD.

faq.ordersShipping.a2.en: Delivery times vary by location. Standard delivery typically takes 5-7 business days, while express delivery takes 2-3 business days.
faq.ordersShipping.a2.translation: Rokovi dostave razlikuju se ovisno o lokaciji. Standardna dostava obično traje 5-7 radnih dana, dok ekspresna dostava traje 2-3 radna dana.

faq.ordersShipping.a3.en: Yes, you can track your order using the tracking number provided in your order confirmation email.
faq.ordersShipping.a3.translation: Da, svoju narudžbu možete pratiti pomoću broja za praćenje koji ste naveli u e-poruci s potvrdom narudžbe.

faq.accountPayments.q1.en: How do I create an account?

faq.accountPayments.a1.en: Click on "Sign In" in the header and select "Create Account" to register for a new account.
faq.accountPayments.a1.translation: Kliknite na "Prijava" u zaglavlju i odaberite "Kreiraj račun" za registraciju novog računa.

faq.accountPayments.q2.en: What payment methods do you accept?

faq.accountPayments.a2.en: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for B2B orders.
faq.accountPayments.a2.translation: Primamo sve glavne kreditne kartice, debitne kartice, PayPal i bankovne transfere za B2B narudžbe.

faq.accountPayments.q3.translation: Jesu li moji podaci o plaćanju sigurni?

faq.accountPayments.a3.en: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your payment information.
faq.accountPayments.a3.translation: Da, koristimo standardno industrijsko šifriranje kako bismo zaštitili vaše podatke o plaćanju.

faq.returnsRefunds.a1.en: We offer a 30-day return policy for unopened products in original packaging. Please contact our customer service for return authorization.
faq.returnsRefunds.a1.translation: Nudimo 30-dnevnu politiku povrata za neotvorene proizvode u originalnom pakiranju. Za odobrenje povrata obratite se našoj korisničkoj službi.

faq.returnsRefunds.q2.en: How do I request a refund?

faq.returnsRefunds.a2.en: Contact our customer service team with your order number and reason for return. We will process your refund within 5-7 business days.
faq.returnsRefunds.a2.translation: Kontaktirajte naš tim za korisničku podršku s brojem narudžbe i razlogom povrata. Povrat ćemo obraditi u roku od 5-7 radnih dana.

faq.contactCta.subtitle.en: Our customer service team is here to help
faq.contactCta.subtitle.translation: Naš tim za korisničku podršku je tu da vam pomogne

careers.description.en: Join Harvics Global Ventures — explore opportunities across 40+ countries.
careers.description.translation: Pridružite se Harvics Global Ventures — istražite prilike u više od 40 zemalja.

careers.heroTitle.en: Build the Future of Global Trade

careers.heroDesc.en: We're growing across 40+ countries. Join a team that's building the AI-powered operating system for global commerce.
careers.heroDesc.translation: Rastemo u više od 40 zemalja. Pridružite se timu koji gradi operativni sustav pokretan umjetnom inteligencijom za globalnu trgovinu.

careers.departments.sales.desc.en: Drive revenue across 40+ markets. Territory management, key accounts, distributor relations.
careers.departments.sales.desc.translation: Povećanje prihoda na više od 40 tržišta. Upravljanje teritorijom, ključni kupci, odnosi s distributerima.

careers.departments.supplyChain.desc.en: End-to-end supply chain from factory to shelf. Fleet management, warehousing, last-mile delivery.
careers.departments.supplyChain.desc.translation: Lanac opskrbe od početka do kraja, od tvornice do police. Upravljanje voznim parkom, skladištenje, dostava na kraj.

careers.departments.technology.desc.en: Build Harvics OS — our AI-powered enterprise platform. Full-stack, ML engineering, data science.
careers.departments.technology.desc.translation: Izgradite Harvics OS — našu poslovnu platformu pokretanu umjetnom inteligencijom. Full-stack, ML inženjering, znanost o podacima.

careers.departments.finance.desc.en: Multi-currency treasury, trade finance, HPay digital payments, FX management across regions.
careers.departments.finance.desc.translation: Viševalutno upravljanje riznicom, trgovinsko financiranje, HPay digitalna plaćanja, upravljanje devizama u različitim regijama.

careers.departments.procurement.desc.en: Global sourcing from 15+ origin countries. Supplier audits, quality control, factory-direct programs.
careers.departments.procurement.desc.translation: Globalna nabava iz više od 15 zemalja podrijetla. Revizije dobavljača, kontrola kvalitete, programi izravne prodaje iz tvornice.

careers.departments.hr.desc.en: Talent acquisition, L&D, performance management across diverse geographies and cultures.
careers.departments.hr.desc.translation: Akvizicija talenata, učenje i razvoj, upravljanje učinkom u različitim geografskim područjima i kulturama.

careers.departments.legal.desc.en: Trade compliance, sanctions screening, IP protection, contract management across jurisdictions.
careers.departments.legal.desc.translation: Usklađenost s trgovinskim propisima, provjera sankcija, zaštita intelektualnog vlasništva, upravljanje ugovorima u različitim jurisdikcijama.

careers.departments.marketing.desc.en: Multi-language campaigns, 38-locale content, digital marketing, brand strategy for 10 verticals.
careers.departments.marketing.desc.translation: Višejezične kampanje, sadržaj za 38 lokacija, digitalni marketing, strategija brenda za 10 vertikala.

careers.benefits.globalMobility.desc.en: Work across Dubai, London, Karachi, Lahore, and 40+ markets
careers.benefits.globalMobility.desc.translation: Rad u Dubaiju, Londonu, Karachiju, Lahoreu i na više od 40 tržišta

careers.benefits.growthTrack.desc.en: Fast-track career progression in a scaling enterprise
careers.benefits.growthTrack.desc.translation: Brzo napredovanje u karijeri u rastućem poduzeću

careers.benefits.aiCulture.desc.en: Work with cutting-edge AI and real-time intelligence systems
careers.benefits.aiCulture.desc.translation: Radite s najsuvremenijim sustavima umjetne inteligencije i inteligencije u stvarnom vremenu

careers.benefits.competitivePackage.desc.translation: Vodeće naknade, stanovanje i beneficije na tržištu

careers.benefits.learningBudget.desc.en: Annual development budget for courses, conferences, and certifications
careers.benefits.learningBudget.desc.translation: Godišnji proračun za razvoj tečajeva, konferencija i certifikata

careers.benefits.flexibleWork.desc.en: Hybrid arrangements with regional hub offices worldwide
careers.benefits.flexibleWork.desc.translation: Hibridni aranžmani s regionalnim središnjim uredima diljem svijeta

strategy.description.en: Building a sustainable future through innovation and excellence
strategy.description.translation: Izgradnja održive budućnosti kroz inovacije i izvrsnost

strategy.heroSubtitle.en: Building a sustainable future through innovation and excellence
strategy.heroSubtitle.translation: Izgradnja održive budućnosti kroz inovacije i izvrsnost

strategy.pillars.globalExpansion.desc.en: Expanding our presence in emerging markets while strengthening our position in established markets
strategy.pillars.globalExpansion.desc.translation: Širimo našu prisutnost na tržištima u razvoju uz istovremeno jačanje naše pozicije na etabliranim tržištima

strategy.pillars.productInnovation.desc.en: Investing in R&D to develop new products that meet evolving consumer preferences
strategy.pillars.productInnovation.desc.translation: Ulaganje u istraživanje i razvoj kako bi se razvili novi proizvodi koji zadovoljavaju promjenjive preferencije potrošača

strategy.pillars.sustainability.desc.en: Committed to sustainable practices across our supply chain and operations
strategy.pillars.sustainability.desc.translation: Posvećeni održivim praksama u cijelom našem lancu opskrbe i poslovanju

strategy.pillars.digitalTransformation.d.en: Leveraging technology to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency
strategy.pillars.digitalTransformation.d.translation: Korištenje tehnologije za poboljšanje korisničkog iskustva i operativne učinkovitosti

strategy.vision.desc.en: To be the world's leading premium consumer goods company, recognized for quality, innovation, and sustainability.
strategy.vision.desc.translation: Biti vodeća svjetska tvrtka za vrhunsku robu široke potrošnje, prepoznata po kvaliteti, inovacijama i održivosti.

seo.home.title.en: Harvics Global Ventures | Premium Global Trading
seo.home.title.translation: Harvics Global Ventures | Premium Global Trading

seo.home.description.en: Leading global trading company delivering premium products across 10+ industries. Operating in 50+ countries since 2019.
seo.home.description.translation: Vodeća globalna trgovačka tvrtka koja isporučuje vrhunske proizvode u više od 10 industrija. Posluje u više od 50 zemalja od 2019. godine.

seo.about.description.en: Discover how Harvics Global Ventures became a leading force in global trade across 40+ countries and 10 industries.
seo.about.description.translation: Otkrijte kako je Harvics Global Ventures postao vodeća snaga u globalnoj trgovini u više od 40 zemalja i 10 industrija.

seo.contact.description.en: Get in touch with Harvics offices worldwide across the Middle East, South Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
seo.contact.description.translation: Kontaktirajte Harvics urede diljem svijeta na Bliskom istoku, u Južnoj Aziji, Europi, Africi i Americi.

seo.products.description.en: Explore Harvics premium product range across FMCG, textiles, commodities, and industrial solutions.
seo.products.description.translation: Istražite Harvicsovu premium ponudu proizvoda u području robe široke potrošnje, tekstila, robe široke potrošnje i industrijskih rješenja.

seo.careers.description.en: Join Harvics Global Ventures — explore opportunities across 40+ countries in FMCG, textiles, logistics, and technology.
seo.careers.description.translation: Pridružite se Harvics Global Ventures — istražite prilike u više od 40 zemalja u području robe široke potrošnje, tekstila, logistike i tehnologije.

seo.media.description.en: Harvics media center — press releases, latest news, brand assets, and media contacts.
seo.media.description.translation: Harvics medijski centar — priopćenja za medije, najnovije vijesti, materijali o robnoj marki i medijski kontakti.

seo.strategy.description.en: Harvics strategic vision for global expansion, innovation, sustainability, and digital transformation.
seo.strategy.description.translation: Harvicsova strateška vizija za globalno širenje, inovacije, održivost i digitalnu transformaciju.

seo.csr.description.en: Harvics CSR initiatives — environmental stewardship, community programs, and ethical business practices.
seo.csr.description.translation: Harvicsove inicijative za društvenu odgovornost — zaštita okoliša, programi u zajednici i etične poslovne prakse.

seo.faq.title.translation: Često postavljana pitanja | Harvics Global Ventures

seo.faq.description.en: Frequently asked questions about Harvics products, services, ordering, and global operations.
seo.faq.description.translation: Često postavljana pitanja o Harvics proizvodima, uslugama, naručivanju i globalnom poslovanju.

seo.locations.description.en: Harvics offices and operations across the Middle East, South Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
seo.locations.description.translation: Harvics uredi i operacije diljem Bliskog istoka, Južne Azije, Europe, Afrike i Amerike.

seo.leadership.description.en: Meet the leadership team driving Harvics Global Ventures across 40+ markets and 10 industry verticals.
seo.leadership.description.translation: Upoznajte vodeći tim koji vodi Harvics Global Ventures na više od 40 tržišta i u 10 industrijskih vertikala.

seo.help.description.en: Get help with orders, accounts, shipping, and Harvics services.
seo.help.description.translation: Zatražite pomoć s narudžbama, računima, dostavom i Harvics uslugama.

seo.compliance.description.en: Harvics commitment to regulatory compliance, ethical business practices, and global standards.
seo.compliance.description.translation: Harvicsova predanost usklađenosti s propisima, etičkim poslovnim praksama i globalnim standardima.

seo.history.description.en: From a Dubai startup in 2019 to a global enterprise spanning 40+ countries — the Harvics story.
seo.history.description.translation: Od startupa u Dubaiju 2019. godine do globalnog poduzeća koje obuhvaća više od 40 zemalja - priča o Harvicsu.

seo.newsletter.description.en: Subscribe to Harvics newsletter for industry insights and product launches.
seo.newsletter.description.translation: Pretplatite se na Harvics bilten za uvide u industriju i lansiranje proizvoda.

seo.login.description.en: Sign in to your Harvics account to manage orders and access the platform.
seo.login.description.translation: Prijavite se na svoj Harvics račun kako biste upravljali narudžbama i pristupili platformi.

seo.research.description.en: Harvics research initiatives and innovation programs driving our global strategy.
seo.research.description.translation: Harvicsove istraživačke inicijative i inovacijski programi pokreću našu globalnu strategiju.

seo.investorRelations.description.en: Investor information, financial reports, and corporate announcements from Harvics Global Ventures.
seo.investorRelations.description.translation: Informacije za investitore, financijska izvješća i korporativne objave tvrtke Harvics Global Ventures.

errors.notFound.description.en: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.notFound.description.translation: Stranica koju tražite ne postoji ili je premještena.

errors.serverError.description.en: We are sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try refreshing the page.
errors.serverError.description.translation: Žao nam je, ali dogodilo se nešto neočekivano. Pokušajte osvježiti stranicu.

errors.globalError.description.en: A critical error occurred. Please reload the page.
errors.globalError.description.translation: Došlo je do kritične pogreške. Ponovno učitajte stranicu.
